key_decisions.original_text: Close PR 5224 (SSZ limit raise); run DevNet <200M gas until progressive lists
key_decisions.context: SSZ limit raise rejected; DevNet gas cap interim solution

key_decisions.original_text: CL validates target adherence; EL validates EIP-1559 rules only
Bid gas limit = target from preferences; payload gas limit = calculated
